description: Random 6-character security identifier.
Initial weight from base universe normalised to sum to 1.
Official exchange closing price per share of the security per the closing prices policy (Appendix VII).
Number of shares of the security held as of end of day t-1 used for index calculation on day t.
Composite inclusion factor (FIF/DIF/GIF/VIF/Index Inclusion Factor) applied to the security's market cap in the index.
Price Adjustment Factor (PAF) applied on the ex-date of a corporate event to preserve historical price comparability. Equals 1 on non-event days.
WMR Closing Spot Rate of the security's price currency versus USD at 4PM London time.
Internal Currency Index (ICI) for the security's price currency. Differs from 1 only when a country changes the internal value of its currency.
Gross dividend per share (before withholding tax) used for reinvestment in MSCI Gross DTR Indexes on the ex-date.
Maximum withholding tax rate applicable to institutional investors used to compute net dividends per share.
Published level of a component index used in the blended index calculation.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "3 Index Calculation for the MSCI Blended Indexes"

description: Fixed proportion assigned to each component index in a blended index set at the time of rebalance.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "3 Index Calculation for the MSCI Blended Indexes"

description: Number of shares of the security traded during day t used to compute daily traded value for the ATVR calculation.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix II: Annualized Traded Value Ratio (ATVR) and Annual Traded Value"

description: FIF- or DIF-adjusted market capitalisation of the security at month end used as denominator in the MTVR calculation.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix II: Annualized Traded Value Ratio (ATVR) and Annual Traded Value"

description: Number of days the security traded in the calendar month used to compute the monthly median traded value.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix II: Annualized Traded Value Ratio (ATVR) and Annual Traded Value"

description: WMR Closing Spot Rate at 4PM London time used as the standard FX rate for MSCI Equity Index calculations.
Impact in basis points of a data error on the affected country index or World/EM industry group index.
Type of index affected by a data error (country/world_industry_group/em_industry_group/frontier_region).
Boolean indicating whether the security traded on the calculation date.
Special or extraordinary cash dividend per share used to determine the PAF trigger.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.2.4 Dividends Resulting in a Reinvestment or in a Price Adjustment"

description: Status of the dividend announcement (confirmed/provisional/unconfirmed); PAF trigger evaluated at confirmed status.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.2.4 Dividends Resulting in a Reinvestment or in a Price Adjustment"

description: Ratio of new shares issued per existing share in a stock dividend (stock bonus or gratis issue).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.2.5 Dividends Resulting in a Price Adjustment Only"

description: Gross capital repayment per share used to compute PAF for extraordinary capital repayments.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.2.5 Dividends Resulting in a Price Adjustment Only"

description: Boolean indicating whether a capital repayment is classified as extraordinary relative to the company's dividend policy or historical distributions.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.2.5 Dividends Resulting in a Price Adjustment Only"

description: Boolean indicating that a previously reinvested dividend has been declared unpaid.
Original dividend amount that was reinvested and is now subject to a payment default correction.
Number of shares outstanding at close of cum-date used for correction and payment-default calculations.
Country where the security is listed; used for country-specific dividend treatment (Japan/Korea/Taiwan/USA).
Country of incorporation of the issuer; used to determine withholding tax rates for net DTR indexes.
Whether the index is domestic or international; determines which WHT rate applies (resident vs non-resident).
Day of the week for the calculation date; used for Sunday intermediary and Sunday-Thursday calendar logic.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix I: Sunday Intermediary Index Calculation"

description: Boolean indicating that the index uses the Sunday intermediary calculation (Monday-Friday series with Sunday placeholder).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix I: Sunday Intermediary Index Calculation"

description: Boolean indicating that the index follows a Sunday-to-Thursday trading calendar.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix XII: Sunday-Thursday Index Calculation Methodology"

description: Dividend per share reinvested in Sunday-Thursday calendar indexes on Sundays.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix XII: Sunday-Thursday Index Calculation Methodology"

description: WMR Closing Spot Rate from the preceding Friday carried forward to Sunday for USD calculation.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "Appendix XII: Sunday-Thursday Index Calculation Methodology"

description: Dividend paid in the same period of the prior year used as the estimated dividend for Japan and Korea.
Dividend estimate announced by the company on the ex-date (Japanese securities); used instead of prior-year if available.
Adjustment factor applied to the prior-year same-period dividend to reflect any capital changes (Korean enhanced methodology).
Final ratified dividend per share used to compute the true-up reinvestment for Japanese and Korean securities.
Number of shares effective on the day prior to ex-date used for Korean estimated dividend reinvestment.
Boolean indicating that a USA company has redeemed shares distributed under a poison pill rights issue.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.3.6 Country Exceptions - USA: Redemption Right"

description: Number of shares received in a Taiwanese stock dividend that are subject to withholding tax (paid from retained earnings).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.3.7.3 Country Exceptions - Taiwanese Stock Dividends"

description: Par value per share used to compute the taxable base for Taiwanese stock dividends.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Index_Calculation_Methodology.md section "2.3.7.3 Country Exceptions - Taiwanese Stock Dividends"

description: Number of shares at close of cum-date (ex_date minus 1) used for dividend reinvestment calculations.
Net dividend per share after deduction of maximum withholding tax used for MSCI Net DTR Index reinvestment.
Ex-date of the distribution; the date from which new buyers are not entitled to the dividend.
Date on which a dividend correction or error was discovered; must be within 12 months of ex_date for action.
Date on which a payment default was discovered and confirmed by data sources; triggers negative reinvestment.
Date on which the ratified dividend amount is received from data sources after initial estimated reinvestment.
Date for which the index level is being calculated; used to look up the WMR Closing Spot Rate.
Date on which a data error affecting an index was discovered; used for the 12-month restatement window check.
Corrected dividend amount to be reinvested as a correction; must be discovered within 12 months of ex_date.
